zones.name: Splash Zone
zones.description: What is AI? Sort the smart machines from the ordinary ones.

zones.name: Training Cove
zones.description: Teach Finn what an apple is — and see how AI can learn the wrong thing!

zones.name: Bright Reef
zones.description: Discover Finn's AI superpowers — all the good AI can do.

zones.name: Murky Depths
zones.description: Real photo or made by AI? Learn to spot the tell-tale tricks!

zones.name: Safe Harbour
zones.description: Be smart and safe with AI. Make your own AI Promise.

badges.name: Splash Zone Explorer
badges.description: Sorted the smart AI from the ordinary machines.

badges.name: Training Cove Champion
badges.description: You taught Finn how AI learns — and why fair, varied examples matter.

badges.name: Bright Reef Helper
badges.description: Discovered all of Finn's AI superpowers.

badges.name: Reef Detective
badges.description: You learned to spot the tell-tale tricks of AI-made pictures and messages.

badges.name: Safe Harbour Captain
badges.description: Made an AI Promise to stay safe and kind.

questions.label: a green apple
questions.prompt: a green apple
A cat photo — but look closely… it has TWO tails!
questions.finnTip: Real cats have one tail! AI pictures sometimes add extra bits that don't belong.

questions.prompt: A red London bus on a busy street.
questions.finnTip: Nothing odd here — this one is a normal, real photo. 📷

questions.prompt: "You WON a free tablet! 🎉 Tell me your home address and password to claim it."
questions.finnTip: A real prize never asks for your password or address. This is a trick — tell a grown-up!

questions.prompt: A photo of someone waving — count the fingers… there are SIX!
questions.finnTip: Count the fingers! AI often gets hands wrong. A great clue that a picture is AI-made.

questions.prompt: A speaker that answers your questions out loud.
questions.finnTip: It listens and learns — that's AI!

questions.prompt: A torch that turns on with a switch.
questions.finnTip: It just lights up when you flick it — no learning. Not AI.

questions.prompt: A camera that finds faces in your photos.
questions.finnTip: Spotting faces is a clever AI trick.

questions.prompt: A doorbell that goes 'ding' when you press it.
questions.finnTip: Same 'ding' every time — no thinking. Not AI.

questions.prompt: A game baddie that learns how you play and gets trickier.
questions.finnTip: It changes and learns about you — that's AI!

questions.prompt: A toaster with a dial you turn.
questions.finnTip: It just heats for the time you pick. Not AI.

questions.prompt: AI helps doctors spot illness early in scans.
questions.finnTip: It can notice tiny signs, so people get help sooner.

questions.prompt: AI reads pictures and words out loud for people who can't see.
questions.finnTip: It reads the world aloud.

questions.prompt: AI can translate languages in seconds.
questions.finnTip: It helps people understand each other.

questions.prompt: AI helps farmers grow food with less water.
questions.finnTip: It helps look after our planet.

questions.prompt: AI warns people when big storms or floods are coming.
questions.finnTip: It helps keep everyone safe.

questions.prompt: AI can help you learn at your own speed.
questions.finnTip: Like a patient helper for every child.

questions.prompt: A game asks for your home address so you can play. What do you do?
questions.finnTip: Never share where you live — always ask a grown-up.

questions.prompt: A pop-up says: 'Type your password to win a prize!' What do you do?
questions.finnTip: Real prizes never ask for passwords. Tell a grown-up.

questions.prompt: An AI chatbot tells you a 'fact' that sounds strange. What do you do?
questions.optionB: Check it with a grown-up or a book
questions.finnTip: AI can be wrong — always double-check.

questions.prompt: You see an AI-made picture that feels scary or unkind. What do you do?
questions.finnTip: Always tell a grown-up if something feels wrong.

questions.prompt: I will check with a grown-up before sharing anything about me.
I won't share my name, address, or passwords.
I'll remember AI can be wrong, so I'll double-check.
I'll be kind when I use AI.
I'll tell a grown-up if something ever feels wrong.
